Class Egg

java.lang.Object
entity.base.BaseItem
entity.base.BaseIngredient
entity.ingredients.Egg
All Implemented Interfaces:
Boilable, Choppable, Grillable
public class Egg extends BaseIngredient implements Boilable, Grillable, Choppable
Represents an egg ingredient.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private int
    boiledPercentage
    The percentage to which the egg has been boiled.
    private final int
    boiledPercentageIncrement
    The increment value for the boiled percentage per tick.
    private boolean
    chopped
    Whether the egg has been chopped (cracked).
    private int
    grilledPercentage
    The percentage to which the egg has been grilled.
    private int
    grilledPercentageIncrement
    The increment value for the grilled percentage per tick.

    Fields inherited from class entity.base.BaseItem

      public void chop()
      Set chopped state to true if chop conditions of that ingredient are met. Else, does nothing.

      chop in interface Choppable
